response.global_analysis: The video is a highlight reel of Raora Panthera's 3D debut. It features Japanese narration, Raora's English dialogue, and a snippet of her original song at the end. On-screen text (dialogue boxes, titles, and lyrics) is transcribed as a secondary priority. Timing is tightly aligned with vocal bursts, including the mascot's 'blip' speech sound effects. Song lyrics were verified against the Reference JSON; the video contains only the final line of the verse ('死ぬまでピュアピュアやってのん？').

subtitles.original: ラオーラが3Dで初登場！
subtitles.english: Raora makes her 3D debut!!

subtitles.original: My tail!
subtitles.english: My tail!

subtitles.original: チャッティーニランドにやってきたラオーラが
subtitles.english: Raora Arrives at Chattini Land, and...

subtitles.original: ジェットパックを賭けてミニゲームで大暴れ！
subtitles.english: Unleashes Chaos in Mini-Games for a jetpack!

subtitles.original: 泣いて
subtitles.english: Tears!

subtitles.original: Please, please, give me the ticket!
subtitles.english: Please, please, give me the ticket!

subtitles.original: 怒って
subtitles.english: Rage!

subtitles.original: I'm done! I'm so done! I'm leaving!
subtitles.english: I'm done! I'm so done! I'm leaving!

subtitles.original: セクシーなラオーラも見れちゃう！
subtitles.english: You can even see a sexy Raora!

subtitles.original: もちろん、歌も歌っちゃうよ！
subtitles.english: Of course, she'll sing too!

subtitles.original: 先輩とケンカもしちゃって
subtitles.english: Having fights with her senpai,

subtitles.original: ジェットパックは手に入るのかな？
subtitles.english: Will she get the jetpack?

subtitles.original: ラオーラ・パンテーラの3Dお披露目、始まるよ！
subtitles.english: Raora Panthera's 3D showcase, starting now!

subtitles.original: Ciao-ra!
subtitles.english: Ciao-ra!

subtitles.original: Are you recording me?
subtitles.english: Are you recording me?

subtitles.original: Ah, where should I look? Where should I look?
subtitles.english: Ah, where should I look? Where should I look?

subtitles.original: Hah! What is this place?
subtitles.english: Hah! What is this place?

subtitles.original: Hah! Oh my gosh! That's a...
subtitles.english: Hah! Oh my gosh! That's a...

subtitles.original: ...that's a giant Chattino in the castle!
subtitles.english: ...that's a giant Chattino in the castle!

subtitles.original: Oh my gosh!
subtitles.english: Oh my gosh!

subtitles.original: And look at the one in the fountain, it's so pretty!
subtitles.english: And look at the one in the fountain, it's so pretty!

subtitles.original: And there's another one over there! Another one!
subtitles.english: And there's another one over there! Another one!

subtitles.original: Hah! Wait a second.
subtitles.english: Hah! Wait a second.

subtitles.original: Is this... is this...
subtitles.english: Is this... is this...

subtitles.original: ...is this Chattini Land?
subtitles.english: ...is this Chattini Land?

subtitles.original: Whoa! That's so cool!
subtitles.english: Whoa! That's so cool!

subtitles.original: Ah, hey, hey cameraman! Come here, come here!
subtitles.english: Ah, hey, hey cameraman! Come here, come here!

subtitles.original: How do I look in 3D? Huh?
subtitles.english: How do I look in 3D? Huh?

subtitles.original: Hey, you should take a look too...
subtitles.english: Hey, you should take a look too...

subtitles.original: You should take a look to my Chattino!
subtitles.english: You should take a look to my Chattino!

subtitles.original: Look at him! Isn't he so pretty?
subtitles.english: Look at him! Isn't he so pretty?

subtitles.original: So cute, right?
subtitles.english: So cute, right?

subtitles.original: Ah! And you also should take a look to...
subtitles.english: Ah! And you also should take a look to...

subtitles.original: ...my tail! Hoo!
subtitles.english: ...my tail! Hoo!

subtitles.original: Big cat means big tail!
subtitles.english: Big cat means big tail!

subtitles.original: Hah! What do you think? How do I look?
subtitles.english: Hah! What do you think? How do I look?

subtitles.original: Hey, hey, hey! Whoa!
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey! Whoa!

subtitles.original: Ah... oh...
subtitles.english: Ah... oh...

subtitles.original: What did you do? Ah...
subtitles.english: What did you do? Ah...

subtitles.original: Come here! I'm gonna use my weapon!
subtitles.english: Come here! I'm gonna use my weapon!

subtitles.original: You come here! Ah, now! How dare you!
subtitles.english: You come here! Ah, now! How dare you!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って！！ 伝えたいことがあるんだ！
subtitles.english: Wait a second!! I need to tell you something!

subtitles.original: How dare you knock me off like this! Huh?
subtitles.english: How dare you knock me off like this! Huh?

subtitles.original: Eh? You can... you can talk?
subtitles.english: Eh? You can... you can talk?

subtitles.original: Oh, that's impressive.
subtitles.english: Oh, that's impressive.

subtitles.original: Well, I'm guessing...
subtitles.english: Well, I'm guessing...

subtitles.original: ...you need me for something? What do you need?
subtitles.english: ...you need me for something? What do you need?

subtitles.original: そうなんだ。 欲しいものがあるんだけど… ミニゲームをクリアしないと手に入らないんだ！
subtitles.english: Yeah. There's this thing we want, but... You can only get it by clearing all the Mini-Games!

subtitles.original: Eh? Mini-games?
subtitles.english: Eh? Mini-games?

subtitles.original: Something you can only get here by clearing mini-games?
subtitles.english: Something you can only get here by clearing mini-games?

subtitles.original: Eh, I think I know what it is.
subtitles.english: Eh, I think I know what it is.

subtitles.original: あれ… あそこのやつ！
subtitles.english: It's... that thing over there!

subtitles.original: Eh? Eh? Eh? Hah!
subtitles.english: Eh? Eh? Eh? Hah!

subtitles.original: Ah! I knew it! It's a jetpack!
subtitles.english: Ah! I knew it! It's a jetpack!

subtitles.original: Oh, the Chattini want one so badly, right?
subtitles.english: Oh, the Chattini want one so badly, right?

subtitles.original: 僕たちだけじゃ無理なんだ。 だからラオーラ、手伝って！
subtitles.english: We can't get it on our own. So help us out Raora! Please!

subtitles.original: Ah, are you begging me?
subtitles.english: Ah, are you begging me?

subtitles.original: Well, you know, little one...
subtitles.english: Well, you know, little one...

subtitles.original: No.
subtitles.english: No.

subtitles.original: I told you I'm not giving you the jetpack.
subtitles.english: I told you I'm not giving you the jetpack.

subtitles.original: So, I'm leaving! Bye-bye! Ciao-ciao!
subtitles.english: So, I'm leaving! Bye-bye! Ciao-ciao!

subtitles.original: お願い！ お願い！ おねがーーい！
subtitles.english: Please! Please! Pleeeease!

subtitles.original: Hey, are you following me? Oh...
subtitles.english: Hey, are you following me? Oh...

subtitles.original: Well, I guess it's a special day after all.
subtitles.english: Well, I guess it's a special day after all.

subtitles.original: Hmm...
subtitles.english: Hmm...

subtitles.original: You know what? I'll give it a shot.
subtitles.english: You know what? I'll give it a shot.

subtitles.original: Haha, okay! Well then, what should I do here?
subtitles.english: Haha, okay! Well then, what should I do here?

subtitles.original: ゲームはこのエリアにあるよ。 がんばってね！
subtitles.english: The game's in this area of the land, so good luck!

subtitles.english: Okay then, I'm gonna do my very best.

subtitles.english: Well, I shall go then.

subtitles.original: Gamba-Raora! Rawr!
subtitles.english: Gamba-Raora! Rawr!

subtitles.original: Waaah!
subtitles.english: Waaah!

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って。 正しい道はあっちだよ。
subtitles.english: Oh, wait. The right way is over there.

subtitles.original: Eh? Eh? Eh? I mean...
subtitles.english: Eh? Eh? Eh? I mean...

subtitles.original: Ah! I'm heading out! Gamba-Raora! Rawr!
